consent.title: Consent for Participation
consent.text: Thank you for agreeing to participate in this interview. We value your insights on the IC2S2 conference and your work in computational social science. By continuing, you consent to participate in this research, which will involve discussing your experiences and perspectives. Your responses will be confidential and used only for research purposes. You may withdraw at any time.

welcome.title: Welcome to the Interview
welcome.text: Thank you for consenting to participate in our study. We're excited to learn more about your experiences and insights related to the IC2S2 conference and the field of computational social science. This interview should take approximately 20-30 minutes. Please answer the questions as openly and honestly as possible.

framing: The interview aims to explore participants' experiences at the IC2S2 conference, motivations for engaging in computational social science, and challenges they face in their research.
introduction: Welcome! We're eager to hear about your journey and experiences in computational social science. Let's dive in.

question_sections.description: Questions about the participant's background and involvement in computational social science.

questions.description: Understanding the participant's professional background and interest in the field.
questions.main_question: Can you tell us a bit about your background and how you became involved in computational social science?
probes: What sparked your interest in this field?
How has your academic or professional journey influenced your focus in computational social science?

questions.description: Inquiring about the participant's current research focus.
questions.main_question: What is your current research focus within computational social science?
probes: How did you choose this specific research area?
What methodologies do you find most effective in your work?

question_sections.description: Questions about attending the IC2S2 conference.

questions.description: Exploring motivations for attending the IC2S2 conference.
questions.main_question: What motivated you to attend the IC2S2 conference this year?
probes: Were there specific sessions or speakers you were interested in?
How did you discover this conference?

questions.description: Understanding the participant's experience during the conference.
questions.main_question: How has your experience at the IC2S2 conference been so far?
probes: What sessions or discussions have you found most insightful?
Have you connected with other researchers here?

question_sections.description: Questions about challenges faced in computational social science research.

questions.description: Investigating challenges in the participant's research work.
questions.main_question: What are some of the challenges you face in your computational social science research?
probes: Are there particular methodological or ethical issues that you encounter?
How do you address these challenges?

questions.main_question: What resources or support systems have been valuable to you in overcoming research challenges?
probes: Have collaborations played a role in overcoming challenges?
Are there specific tools or platforms that you rely on?

outro: Thank you for sharing your insights and experiences. Your contributions are invaluable to our understanding of the computational social science community. If you have any further thoughts to add, feel free to reach out via email.
alt_outro: Thank you for your time. If you have any questions or need further information, please feel free to contact us.
